summary.zh: 把仓库内置的 forgeax 命令(packages/cli)接成 ForgeaX Studio 的原生推理后端。runner spawn `forgeax chat --stream` 子进程,把 ChatEvent 流桥接到消息总线;支持流式、思考、工具调用、子 agent 与会话。它是「无需外部 CLI」的内置后端,新机器开箱即用,首次启动的默认引导也走它。
summary.en: Wires the in-repo forgeax command (packages/cli) in as ForgeaX Studio's native reasoning backend. The runner spawns `forgeax chat --stream` and bridges ChatEvent streams onto the bus, with streaming, thinking, tool calls, sub-agents and sessions. It is the built-in backend that needs no external CLI — works out of the box on a fresh machine and backs first-run onboarding.

body.zh:
Runner:forgeax chat --stream
ChatEvent 流桥接到 Bus
body.en:
Runner: forgeax chat --stream
Bridges ChatEvent streams to the Bus

body.zh:
流式 / 思考 / 工具调用 / 子 agent / 会话
内置原生后端,无需外部 CLI
body.en:
streaming / thinking / tool calls / sub-agents / sessions
Native built-in backend, no external CLI

body.zh: 开箱可用;面板管理可切换其他后端
body.en: Works out of the box; switch backends in Admin

notes.zh: 首版:内置 forgeax 后端适配
notes.en: First release: native forgeax backend adapter
